methodology.baseline: Stock sklearn / PyTorch CPU (no Intel patches)
methodology.intel_path: sklearnex.patch_sklearn() before sklearn imports; OpenVINO when IR artifacts present at /app/model_ir/
methodology.accuracy_guard: If accuracy_delta > 1% vs baseline, do not promote INT8 — stay FP16

workloads.name: KMeans cohort clustering
workloads.note: sklearnex ImportError in the benchmark environment — workload is instrumented but skipped until the bench runner is executed inside a match-engine container where sklearnex is installed.

workloads.name: MiniLM sentence embedding (PyTorch CPU → OpenVINO)
workloads.note: PyTorch CPU baseline measured. OpenVINO comparison pending IR model export (run: optimum-cli export openvino --model sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 --task feature-extraction services/match-engine/model_ir/).
